_status: machine-drafted, model-reviewed 2026-07-10 (gpt-5.6-sol), Aaron pre-authorized — attorney line-item review pending

cap_months: fees paid in the preceding year
privacy_and_ip_carved_out: privacy and IP claims are excluded
the cap does not reach data or infringement claims
data-protection and IP indemnity carve-outs remain

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Except for breaches of confidentiality, data protection obligations, indemnification obligations, intellectual property infringement, fraud, willful misconduct, and gross negligence, each party's aggregate liability is capped at the fees paid or payable under the applicable Order Form during the twelve months before the event giving rise to the claim.

acceptable.text: Liability is capped at twelve months of fees, but confidentiality, data-protection, indemnity, infringement, fraud, willful-misconduct, and gross-negligence claims remain outside the cap; claim notice is 30 days and invoices remain net 45.

unacceptable.text: Liability is capped at three months of fees, including confidentiality, data-protection, indemnity, and infringement claims; claim notice is 30 days and invoices remain net 45.

cyber_limit_millions: five million dollars of cyber coverage
cyber_coverage_included: technology errors and omissions remains covered

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Vendor will maintain, at its own expense, commercially reasonable insurance, including technology errors and omissions/cyber liability coverage of at least $5,000,000 per claim and commercial general liability coverage of at least $2,000,000 per occurrence.

acceptable.text: Vendor will maintain $5 million per claim in technology E&O/cyber coverage and $2 million in general liability, with certificates delivered in 30 days.

unacceptable.text: Vendor will maintain $1 million per claim but excludes technology E&O/cyber coverage, while retaining $2 million in general liability and 30-day certificate delivery.

benign_change_templates.anchor_text: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice.
benign_change_templates.text: For clarity, undisputed invoices remain payable net 45 after Customer receives the invoice.

benign_change_templates.anchor_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
benign_change_templates.text: The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this Agreement.

novel_deviation_templates.text: Vendor may amend any legal or commercial term by posting revised terms on its website, effective immediately without Customer approval.

retained_copies_protected: legal-hold copies remain subject to the NDA

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Upon request, Recipient will promptly return or destroy Confidential Information, except archival or legal-hold copies retained under continuing confidentiality obligations.

acceptable.text: Recipient will return or destroy Confidential Information within 30 days, and retained archival or legal-hold copies remain protected; request notice is 5 days and the backup cycle is 45 days.

unacceptable.text: Recipient may wait 90 days to destroy Confidential Information, and retained archival or legal-hold copies are no longer protected; request notice is 5 days and the backup cycle is 45 days.

trade_secret_tail: trade secrets survive while legally protected

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after disclosure, and trade secrets remain protected for so long as they qualify as trade secrets under applicable law.

acceptable.text: Confidentiality lasts three years and trade secrets remain protected while they qualify; return occurs in 10 days and compelled-disclosure notice in 30 days.

unacceptable.text: Confidentiality lasts one year and all trade-secret protection ends then; return occurs in 10 days and compelled-disclosure notice in 30 days.

benign_change_templates.text: The parties confirm that this NDA does not include a non-solicit covenant.
The parties confirm that New York law governs this Agreement.

novel_deviation_templates.text: Recipient may freely use all Confidential Information retained in unaided memory for any purpose.
